prompt: Create a dark fantasy anime-style full-body portrait of a tree-human girl standing in a snowy winter forest. The subject is a tall feminine dryad/cyborg-like character with a human upper silhouette but her skin and limbs are transformed into cracked bark, twisted roots, and bare branches. She has extremely long flowing black hair cascading almost to the ground, partially tangled with the branches, and a blurred/obscured face with a calm, eerie presence. Her arms are raised high and have become two large gnarled tree branches forming an arch above her head, with tiny red berries and patches of snow on the twigs. Her legs are bark-covered trunks ending in exposed root-like feet spreading across the snow. She wears the remnants of a torn black school-uniform-inspired outfit: a shredded black blazer, white shirt, short pleated skirt, thigh straps, and one tactical pouch strapped to her left thigh. Add exactly two distinct accessories/items: a rectangular ID badge pinned to her chest with the visible number 77, and a pale paper or envelope caught on the raised right-side branch. Above her head floats a small dark oval halo or sign with red lettering reading JIS. The setting is a dense, cold, blue-gray forest at night or dusk, with dark tree trunks in the background, falling snow, snow-covered ground, scattered rocks, and sparse red berries on low branches. Use dramatic cinematic lighting, high detail, realistic bark texture, delicate snow accumulation, moody depth of field, elegant horror atmosphere, vertical composition, centered full-body framing, no extra characters, no gore, no watermark.
